productDisplayName: Classic Polo Men's Swiss Red T-shirt
description: CompositionRed polo neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, with white double pin stripes, ribbed collar and cuff, embroidered logo on left chest, short buttoned placket, grey fabric tape on the inseam of the collar and vented hemFittingSlimWash care Use mild detergent Avoid beating and twisting Wash in cold water Rinse thoroughly Iron at low temperature Dry in shade on reverse side Tumble wash/ dry What can be better than a stripes-and-polo neck combination? Nothing! This red t-shirt with white stripes looks classy, smart and suave. The slim Fit is perfect for those who prefer a snug fit. A versatile tee, it can be teamed with jeans or chinos, and looks equally great with both. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
